arts.ttl: Man City's £300m bargain amid eyewatering Old Trafford and Newcastle United costs
arts.sum: Manchester City's North Stand rebuild is well underway while Newcastle United and Manchester United are seeking to extend or build new stadiums

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis charged with misconduct after ‘improper behaviour’ against Fulham
arts.sum: The Greek shipping magnate is alleged to have behaved improperly after his club’s defeat to Fulham

arts.ttl: I played for both Pep Guardiola and Marcelo Bielsa – this is how they're different
arts.sum: Man City boss Pep Guardiola has sung Marcelo Bielsa's praises on many occasions, and Kalvin Phillips knows exactly what it's like to play under both iconic managers

arts.ttl: Fulham abandoned £15m deal to sign player from Southampton, now he's in UEFA Champions League Team of the Week
"It peed me off!" - Kalvin Phillips discusses impact of Pep Guardiola's 'overweight' comments
arts.sum: Kalvin Phillips admits that he is still "peed off" with Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola labelling him as 'overweight' during his time at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man City Esports confirm EA SPORTS FC 25 roster for 2024/25 season
arts.sum: Our ePremier League triumph made Man City Esports the first club to claim the title twice – and Tekkz became the first player to achieve the feat too. “I am very happy to continue sharing a team with Tekkz this season too, I think we will be able to achieve what we did last campaign in the ePremier League.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Fulham: Prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Champions have dropped points in successive top-flight matches ahead of Etihad return

arts.ttl: Man City 'will do everything they can' to agree new contract with star player
arts.sum: Manchester City will 'do everything they can' to tie Kevin De Bruyne down to a new contract at the Etihad Stadium, according to a report.

arts.ttl: England interim boss Lee Carsley responds to Kyle Walker challenge after recall
arts.sum: Kyle Walker was left out of Lee Carsley's first England squad as interim manager but the Manchester City defender has been recalled ahead of next week's Nations League fixtures

arts.ttl: Man City have a new superstar - they won't be able to keep him hidden for much longer
arts.sum: Manchester City's impressive start to the season has been offset by key injuries - with Rico Lewis proving useful in covering the loss of Rodri and Kevin De Bruyne.
